details.test: Task 1: Select cheapest full-day June wedding package with two photographers and add to quote
Task 2: Configure 3-hour corporate event with on-site printing and submit inquiry
Task 3: Choose wedding photographer with highest years of experience from filtered list
Task 4: Create custom add-on bundle with photo booth and >=3 add-ons, then attach to a wedding package
Task 5: Schedule 30-minute wedding video consultation approximately two weeks from today
Task 6: Search timeline blog posts and save first two to reading list
Task 7: Build ceremony shot list by favoriting all available ceremony images and opening shot list view
Task 8: Check availability for a June 2026 Austin wedding and proceed to booking summary
Task 9: Prepare $300 gift card with custom message and reach checkout review (no payment)
